# ROMAN Notice

The code in this directory is adapted from ROMAN:
https://github.com/mit-acl/ROMAN

ROMAN citation:

M.B. Peterson, Y.X. Jia, Y. Tian, A. Thomas, and J.P. How,
"ROMAN: Open-Set Object Map Alignment for Robust View-Invariant Global
Localization," Robotics: Science and Systems, 2025.

```bibtex
@inproceedings{peterson2025roman,
  title={{ROMAN: Open-Set Object Map Alignment for Robust View-Invariant Global Localization}},
  author={Peterson, Mason B and Jia, Yi Xuan and Tian, Yulun and Thomas, Annika and How, Jonathan P},
  booktitle={Robotics: Science and Systems (RSS)},
  pdf={https://www.roboticsproceedings.org/rss21/p029.pdf},
  year={2025}
}
```

The upstream ROMAN repository does not currently include an explicit license
file in this vendored copy. Redistribution and reuse should follow any terms
provided by the ROMAN authors.
